title: 目標達成の後に・秘密基地

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka trains diligently for the Yayoi Sho,
which has been added to her schedule as
preparation for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During this time, she invites me on a hike up a
mountain she often visits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The climb is steep and trying, but what awaits us
at the top is a grand and vast view.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take in the stunning scenery that Silence
Suzuka so loves. Our bond grows stronger as we
enjoy the view together.
